calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

Petition To Approve Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar May-12-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Howard Kane appeared via zoom for Arcadia Maximo (petitioner).
Sheila Robello appeared via zoom for Nahia West.
Deborah Fox appeared in person for Debra Dolch.

From the outset of the hearing Ms. Fox requested the waiver of notice on behalf of her client.

The Court hearing no objections granted the Petition to Approve Settlement Agreement.

Visiting Judge: Rene Chouteau. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Guzman. Not reported.

Petition To Approve Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Apr-07-2026 Continued To May-12-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-18-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Himat Bainiwal appeared by zoom for and with Phyllis Whitfield by zoom.
Deborah Taylor appeared by zoom for Stephanie Windham (interested party).

Mrs. Whitfield stated that she had to be put in a care facility, that prior counsel quit on them the day she got out and that his actions have rendered her helpless. Mr. Bainiwal stated that they are open to having the court appoint a fiduciary. The court informed Mr. Bainiwal that they would have to file a petition to have one appointed. The Petition for Letters of Administration is off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: G. Tan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-13-2024 Continued To Sep-18-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-02-2024 Continued To Aug-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sheila Robello appeared by zoom for Nahia West (interested party).
John DiAna appeared by zoom for Stephanie Windham (interested party/executor for the Estate of Jane Windham).
Jonathan Maddison appeared by zoom for Phyllis Whitfield.

Mr. Maddison stated that he just processed a substitution of attorney, that he had discussion with opposing counsel and there appears to be some grounds for settlement which they are discussing, and requested a continuance to work out the details. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to August 13, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.
